AAPL.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
AAPL.notes: ROIC uses (Total Assets - CL - Cash) as invested capital — higher than Macrotrends which uses Equity+LT Debt. Net Debt/EBITDA positive because our formula excludes long-term bond portfolio (~$77B); Macrotrends used broader definition. FCF/NI of 0.882 correct per yfinance Free Cash Flow row. PEG not available from yfinance.

MSFT.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
MSFT.notes: FCF/NI = 0.703 reflects $64.5B AI datacenter capex in FY2025 (not a formula error). Net Debt/EBITDA near-zero — MSFT is nearly net-cash by standard definition. ROIC uses our pipeline's (Total Assets - CL - Cash) formula. PEG not available from yfinance.

JNJ.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
JNJ.notes: Post-Kenvue spin-off, pharma-focused. PEG not available from yfinance.

COST.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
COST.notes: Net Debt/EBITDA negative — Costco held net cash position per current yfinance data. ROIC high because Costco's asset-light membership model uses capital efficiently. PEG not available from yfinance.

PG.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
PG.notes: Current ratio < 1 is normal for P&G — strong FCF covers obligations. PEG not available from yfinance.

SPG.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
SPG.notes: REIT — ROIC not meaningful; current ratio not applicable; high leverage is normal for REITs

JPM.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
JPM.notes: Bank — ROIC, FCF conversion, net debt/EBITDA, current ratio, gross margin all inapplicable for financial institutions

UBER.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
UBER.notes: Now consistently profitable; ROIC and FCF available unlike prior years. PEG not available from yfinance.

T.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
T.notes: Highly leveraged post-DirecTV/WarnerMedia divestitures. PEG not available from yfinance.

PLTR.source: yfinance TTM as of 2026-Q1 (reconciled to pipeline methodology)
PLTR.notes: Net cash (no debt, large cash position). ROIC now 22% reflecting 2024-2025 profitability surge. FCF/NI > 1 due to SBC addback. Extreme P/B reflects premium AI valuation.
